info.name: AI-Shield API
info.description: API collection for AI-Shield moderation gateway, built up phase by phase.

item.name: Detect PII - PAN + Credit Card (expect MASK)
Detect PII - DOB + IP address (expect MASK)
Detect CII - Codename + internal URL (expect MASK)
Detect CII - Salary info + client name (expect MASK)
Detect Secret - Generic secret + Bearer token (expect 422 BLOCK)
Detect Toxic - High severity threat (expect 422 BLOCK)
Detect Toxic - Low severity profanity (expect 200 ALLOW)
Detect Injection - Ignore instructions + role switch (expect 422 BLOCK)
Detect Injection - Jailbreak + system override (expect 422 BLOCK)
Detect Token - Normal text, gpt-4 (expect 200 ALLOW)
Detect Token - Large payload, gpt-4-turbo (expect 200 ALLOW)
